title: wolfhsm crate: crypto modules
description: Implement wolfhsm/src/crypto/ modules wrapping HSM crypto ops via C shims and direct FFI. Modules: ecc.rs (EccP256Key + EccP256Signer impl signature::Signer<DerSignature>), ed25519.rs (Ed25519Key + Ed25519Signer, no shim needed — ed25519_key is 256 bytes), curve25519.rs (Curve25519Key X25519 DH), rsa.rs (RsaKey sign/verify/keygen via shim), mldsa.rs (MlDsaKey feature=mldsa), aes.rs (AesKey GCM/CBC/CTR + AeadInPlace impl), sha.rs (HsmSha256/384/512 + digest::Digest + digest::Update + digest::FixedOutput), cmac.rs (CmacKey compute), hkdf.rs (make_cache_key, make_export_key), rng.rs (generate). All key types have generate/load/commit/evict lifecycle.
